query:
-- 用戶表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `users` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `openId` varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `name` text,
  `email` varchar(320),
  `loginMethod` varchar(64),
  `role` enum('user','admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- AI 預測表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_predictions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `predDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `sourceHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `targetHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `goldenBalls` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `aiReasoning` text,
  `isManual` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `userId` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `predDate_idx` (`predDate`),
  KEY `userId_idx` (`userId`)
);

-- 開獎記錄表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `draw_records` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `drawNumber` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `drawTime` timestamp,
  `numbers` json NOT NULL,
  `superNumber` int,
  `total` int,
  `bigSmall` varchar(10),
  `oddEven` varchar(10),
  `plate` varchar(10),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `drawTime_idx` (`drawTime`)
);

-- 驗證記錄表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `verification_records` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `predictionId` int NOT NULL,
  `drawId` int NOT NULL,
  `hits` json,
  `missed` json,
  `isHit` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `hitCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `predictionId_idx` (`predictionId`),
  KEY `drawId_idx` (`drawId`)
);

-- 分析記錄表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `analysis_records` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `analysisDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `sourceHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `targetHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `goldenBalls` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `verificationCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `hitCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `hitRate` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `analysisDate_idx` (`analysisDate`)
);

-- 模擬投注表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `simulations` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `simulationDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `sourceHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `targetHour` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `goldenBalls` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `betAmount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `resultStatus` varchar(20),
  `winAmount` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `userId_idx` (`userId`),
  KEY `simulationDate_idx` (`simulationDate`)
);

-- 賓果遊戲房間表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bingo_rooms` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `status` enum('waiting','playing','finished') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'waiting',
  `maxPlayers` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 20,
  `currentPlayers` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `creatorId` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `creatorId_idx` (`creatorId`)
);

-- 賓果遊戲表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bingo_games` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `roomId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('waiting','playing','finished') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'waiting',
  `drawnNumbers` json NOT NULL DEFAULT ('[]'),
  `winners` json NOT NULL DEFAULT ('[]'),
  `startedAt` timestamp,
  `finishedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `roomId_idx` (`roomId`)
);

-- 賓果卡表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bingo_cards` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `gameId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL,
  `numbers` json NOT NULL,
  `markedNumbers` json NOT NULL DEFAULT ('[]'),
  `isBingo` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `bingoTime` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `gameId_idx` (`gameId`),
  KEY `playerId_idx` (`playerId`)
);

-- 遊戲參與者表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_participants` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `gameId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('joined','bingo','left') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'joined',
  `joinedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `leftAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  KEY `gameId_idx` (`gameId`),
  KEY `playerId_idx` (`playerId`)
);

-- 玩家統計表
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `player_stats` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `totalGames` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `bingoCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `winRate` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `bestScore` int,
  `averageDraws` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
